newsSince: SÜSS MicroTec joined the MDAX for the first time on June 22 via the Fast Entry rule (an index-flow event, not a fundamental change). Berenberg raised its PT to €125 (Buy), citing record order intake and the new XBC300 Gen2 D2W hybrid-bonding platform; management targets above-market growth with a 20-22% EBIT margin. Stock +5% since June 9, largely flow-driven.

sources.label: Berenberg lifts PT to €125 after MDAX entry (ad-hoc-news)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the latent under-covered AI-supply-chain lens, the hybrid-bonding/advanced-packaging tool role is intact and slightly strengthened by the XBC300 Gen2 launch and record orders. But MDAX inclusion is a flow event that reduces 'latent/under-covered' status, so net mild positive only.
verdicts.bull: Hybrid-bonding leader levered to AI advanced-packaging capex; record orders, PT raised to €125.
verdicts.neutral: Strong tool franchise but now far less under-covered post-MDAX entry.
verdicts.bear: 136% YTD; ~45% above fair-value estimates; small cap, lumpy orders.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation reset if packaging capex slows

verdicts.rankRationale: On the test-time-scaling lens, advanced-packaging and lithography process tools stay relevant to AI compute scaling; XBC300 Gen2 and record orders are incrementally supportive. MDAX inclusion is flow, not fundamentals, so role in the semiconductor bucket is unchanged with a small positive drift.
verdicts.bull: Bonding/litho tools enable the chiplet/HBM stack that underpins scaling.
verdicts.bear: Rich multiple after 136% YTD; order timing volatile.
